reviews.review_description:
Was actually looking forward to this as well as I’ve worked as a delivery driver in real life!
 
TO FIX:
•Supposed to be a sitting game but the moment the game loads, the camera view will have you either hanging off the bike to the side or the bike literally in your chest, so you can’t even get ready to press start gameplay and have to head to the settings quick

•Very irritating that you don’t get taken to a pause screen where when navigating the settings and instead are still riding the bike which uses the same controls for clicking through the settings

•Settings doesn’t save, so I have to set the seat / camera angle, switch between VR or buttons to control direction / forward / reverse (which the VR controls DOES NOT WORK PROPERLY SO I have to use buttons) every single time I play

•Bike swerves all over the place and won’t turn properly when driving even the AI cars do this and end up doing a 360 out of the blue and can crash into you, make the driving controls and AI prompts when driving better 

•Open world but no type of levelling up system, no upgrades and nothing to buy when you earn the money — you will just be wasting money on gas / petrol which runs out unbelievably fast, luckily the bike doesn’t stop when you run out though 

•Gives you typically 5 mins to pick up and deliver which most of the time won’t work out based on the map being quite big (which is good) and when you try to pick up from a restaurant sometimes the merchant just looks at you and doesn’t say anything but most of the time they give you the delivery (good dialogue) but good when you arrive to give the food to the customer there standing outside their house but in general 5 mins is not enough especially if you need gas or are a little further out due to another delivery.

•I like that it has a navigation system but would be better if it could be displayed on screen when driving and not in your hands (can see it but still not realistic) and then when we jump off the bike then it would be fine to pick it up from the bike holder when picking up / dropping off

•Would be nice if we could accept more than one delivery at a time, possibly have deliveries groups that are from the same or nearby shop when picking up or nearby each other or same flat when delivering 

•I understand that it wouldn’t be realistic as it’s animated but would be great if the devs could make the graphics, environment and driving aspects better

•In third person mode you can see the rider with a delivery bag on his back but it’s not used at all because when we pick up the order it’s glued to our hand, would be better if we could put the order in our delivery bag (Using the VR controls in other games to actually put it behind your back) or if you could add a top box / delivery bag storage space, so that we could put the order at the rear of the bike

•As for sound, there’s dialogue from the restaurant worker and customer as mentioned above which is fine but other than that 

•Would be interesting if you added waiting in the restaurant for the order (not too long but realistic) , an option to cancel the order and also when dropping off the order, instead of the customer waiting outside, would be interesting to be let into their flat and have to either climb stairs / take lift to get to them

Could only complete 2 drop offs, couldn’t bear it any longer!

Can’t recommend this game to anyone currently!

Gave 2 stars as it has potential!

Devs please fix the above, otherwise it’s unbearable to play and waste of money!

The game is lackluster from everything to how it looks to how it has incredibly clunky controls.
The low-end blocky-ish look and simple textures of the very empty looking "city" I could easily get past (graphics are not at all importantafterall)  if the controls for getting around this 2000 PS1-era city weren't so frustratingly designed! 
Getting on and off the bike is never explained (well, nothing really is I guess) and happened to be clicking the thumbstick oddly enough.
There's NO seated option in a driving game, so when you are walking around, you better stand up or you'll stay lower to the ground...
Add to the the slow speed and even slower turning, and it becomes a CHORE to do the ONE gameplay task the entire game is even built around!
How a studio who has developed 2 other different racing/ vehicle games  previously (though they were disappointments I had to refund as well) can mess up this badly on their newest game, I have no idea...

So an empty city that doesn't look good/ not worth exploring as there's nothing to see, simple gameplay that has little/ no real reward (you get paid, but that only seems to pay for gas so as to keep playing at full speed rather than actual rewards) , and clunky frustrating controls to ruin what very little may even be there, taking away what they claim to be "relaxing". There's no joy in it...
This is just sad for a game more than $2...

I can't recommend this game to anyone, as there are so many better options that control well and offer much more gameplay-wise.

I bought this game a couple of days ago. Played it for a bit before going to work. Tried to play it today and the game keeps crashing and closing. I tried uninstalling and reinstalling and it still keeps crashing. I should have listened to my right mind and not even bought this game.

reviews.review_title: Early day's pick ups and drop offs
reviews.review_description: So love riding the motorbike around picking up packages and delivering to people.  Controls are easy enough, simplistic game play and it's great that you have a sat nav, I would be lost without it.  I managed a handful of pickups and drops offs avoiding some random driving by cars around the streets and managed to refuel a few times.  Not much to the game play at the moment but you must remember this is still early access and I look forward to seeing where the devs take it in due course.

It is not perfect, it does need a little work still, struggling to get to grips with the riding mechanics.
Do I use the thumbstick  or handlebars.

I think it has potential, hope the dev keeps adding more to this.
This could be something really good, just needs a few things ironed out.
I have faith In the dev to tweak a few things.
Love the concept and do need to play deeper into this.

reviews.review_title: Great Idea, needs a bit more work
reviews.review_description: Great idea, but I found it hard to control.I am quite old though, maybe easy for younger folks to play. Can see a good game in the future with a bit of tidying up. Good luck guys, keep at it.
